message:
feat(runtime_compat): migrate broadcast channel to asupersync (wa-2abzy)

Complete the tokio→asupersync channel migration by adding the broadcast
channel wrapper under the asupersync-runtime feature flag. This was the
last channel type still using tokio directly.

Changes:
- Bump asupersync rev to 6be1c989 (adds try_recv, receiver_count, len
  to broadcast::Sender/Receiver)
- Add #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] broadcast module with
  Sender/Receiver wrappers that acquire Cx internally
- Add #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))] tokio fallback path
- Update broadcast_receiver_count/broadcast_len to require T: Clone
- Update select! docs to reflect all channel types now migrated

All 209 runtime_compat tests pass in both default and asupersync-runtime
configurations. 22 broadcast-specific tests verified in both modes.

Channel migration status (all under asupersync-runtime feature):
  ✅ mpsc — two-phase reserve/commit
  ✅ watch — version-tracked state observation
  ✅ oneshot — wrapped sender with Cx acquisition
  ✅ broadcast — wrapped sender/receiver with Cx acquisition
  ✅ notify — direct re-export

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
